metric.definition: difficulty_score in [0,1] (higher = harder), a weighted mean of percentile-ranked embedding-space components: warm_crowd (count of other players at cosine >= 0.6, the game's 'warm' feedback threshold), nn10_sim (cosine to 10th nearest neighbour), scout_pool (players consistent with the turn-1 scouting line: same archetype cluster + overlapping top-2 elite features), and inverted salience (L2 norm of the 16-dim tournament z-vector).
metric.expected_solve: MODEL ESTIMATE, not measured telemetry (the site is static and zero-backend; no solve data exists). Logistic map anchored so the corpus-median target = 0.6 solve (midpoint of the 40-80% steering band) with slope 5.0. The relative ranking is embedding-derived; the absolute scale is a stated assumption.
metric.fame_prior: none -- the repo has no popularity/coverage data, so none is used; famous players score mid-scale unless statistically distinctive
metric.rotation_note: upcoming[] resolves the deterministic daily seed ('vector-pitch:{date}', xmur3->mulberry32, replicated bit-for-bit) and flags out-of-band days in this JSON only; rotation logic is unchanged
